stories.headline: Marine Le Pen's moment of truth: Why Tuesday court verdict matters for France
stories.description: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential electio...

stories.headline: One million more UK homeowners expected to face mortgage hit
stories.description: Homeowners face paying £45 a month more on average when they move onto a new deal over the next two years.

stories.headline: Bangladesh landslides kill nine, including eight Rohingya in refugee camp
stories.description: Hillsides collapse at four locations at camps in Cox’s Bazar in southeastern Bangladesh amid monsoon rains.

stories.headline: What is the new Gaza administration as Hamas dissolves government?
stories.description: The NCAG will oversee civilian affairs such as health and education, as well as security.

stories.headline: Explosions in Damascus during Macron visit: What we know
stories.description: Blasts occur near hotel French president was reportedly staying in shortly after he departs for presidential palace.
